title: phyllorkis nilgherensis
intro: Phyllorkis nilgherensis, also known as the Nilgiri orchid, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Ghats of India. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Phyllorkis nilgherensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in Ayurvedic medicine. Herbal preparations of Phyllorkis nilgherensis typically involve drying and powdering the plant's leaves and roots, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or topical creams for medicinal purposes.
